title: TNT-Bombing
description: With this mod you can bomb with TNT and TNT-Minecarts more easily
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9cc15825a46d76c9999c92434b8cf3870215a2d.png)

# **With this mod, you can summon TNT or a TNT-minecart if you have a flint and steel in either your offhand or main hand, and if you have some TNT in your inventory. Additionally, igniting TNT will damage your flint and steel. Also new you can explode yourself with TNT in Mainhand**
